mapper.select: SELECT product_id, stock, recommended_stock, updated_at FROM product_stocks ORDER BY product_id
SELECT product_id, stock, recommended_stock, updated_at FROM product_stocks WHERE product_id = #{productId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product_stocks ( product_id, stock, recommended_stock, updated_at ) SELECT #{productId}, #{defaultStock}, #{defaultRecommendedStock}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM product_stocks WHERE product_id = #{productId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE product_stocks SET stock = stock + #{quantity}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() WHERE product_id = #{productId}
UPDATE product_stocks SET recommended_stock = #{recommendedStock}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() WHERE product_id = #{productId}
